title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[Optimizations & Fixes]
- Added a new "Skip" button to Honor Expedition, allowing Chiefs to instantly complete battles during Quick Challenge.

- Optimized the purchase logic for Arena Challenge Tickets in the VIP Store. When neither Arena nor 3v3 Arena is available, this item can no longer be purchased to prevent accidental Gem spending.

- Improved recruitment animations and the skip experience, and fixed a rare issue that could cause lag during consecutive recruitments.
